etymology.description: semantic 屮 (sprout) + phonetic 母 (mǔ, "mother") -> adult woman ready for marriage and generation -> each time
etymology.interpretation: The character 每 (měi, "each") combines the semantic element 屮 ("sprout") with the phonetic 母 (mǔ, "mother"). The sprout component implies growth and maturity, suggesting a woman has reached adulthood. This connects to the idea of 'each time' through the readiness for recurring life cycles or activities, such as marriage and childbearing.

examples.chinese: 每个人都有自己的梦想(每個人都有自己的夢想)。
examples.pinyin: Měi gèrén dōu yǒu zìjǐ de mèngxiǎng.
examples.english: Each person has their own dreams.

examples.chinese: 他每天早上锻炼身体(他每天早上鍛鍊身體)。
每次见到她(每次見到她)，我都很开心(我都很開心)。
examples.pinyin: Měi cì jiàndào tā, wǒ dōu hěn kāixīn.
examples.english: Each time I see her, I am very happy.
